zh.lifeSummary: John Jennens是William Jennens的兒子，出生。他和Mary Weaman至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Jennens是William Jennens的儿子，出生。他和Mary Weaman至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Jennens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Jennings
meanings: English: variant of Jenning , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
German: patronymic from a pet form (see Jenning ) of the personal name Johannes (see John ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: John Jennens was born as the son of William Jennens. He had at least 1 son with Mary Weaman.

fr.lifeSummary: John Jennens est né, fils de William Jennens. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mary Weaman.

de.lifeSummary: John Jennens wurde, als Sohn von William Jennens geboren. Er hatte mit Mary Weaman mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: John Jennens è nato il come figlio di William Jennens. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mary Weaman.

ja.lifeSummary: John JennensはWilliam Jennensの息子として生まれた。彼はMary Weamanとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: John Jennens(은)는 William Jennens의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mary Weaman(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Jennens nasceu filho de William Jennens. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mary Weaman.

ru.lifeSummary: John Jennens родился. Его отца звали William Jennens. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mary Weaman.

es.lifeSummary: John Jennens nació como hijo de William Jennens. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mary Weaman.

th.–Female: ถึงแก่กรรม
